description.para: The 5 constants are the prefixes or suffixes for merge on read configuration.

The complete configuration keys can be:
fields.$field_name.aggregate-function
fields.$field_name.ignore-retract
fields.$field_names.sequence-group ($field_names support one or more field_name, split with FIELDS_SEPARATOR)

briefdescription.para: FIELDS_SEPARATOR is ",".
FIELDS_PREFIX is "fields".
AGG_FUNCTION is "aggregate-function".
DEFAULT_AGG_FUNCTION is "default-aggregate-function".
IGNORE_RETRACT is "ignore-retract".
"distinct" - Distinct option for aggregate functions like listagg.

detaileddescription.para: Default value is false. Example: fields.f.distinct=true to deduplicate values during aggregation.

briefdescription.para: "list-agg-delimiter" - Delimiter for listagg aggregate function.

detaileddescription.para: Default value is ",". Example: fields.f.list-agg-delimiter="-" to concatenate values with "-".

briefdescription.para: SEQUENCE_GROUP is "sequence-group".
"bucket" - Bucket number for file store.

detaileddescription.para: It should either be equal to -1 (dynamic bucket mode), or it must be greater than 0 (fixed bucket mode).

briefdescription.para: "bucket-key" - Specify the paimon distribution policy.

detaileddescription.para: Data is assigned to each bucket according to the hash value of bucket-key. If you specify multiple fields, delimiter is ','. If not specified, the primary key will be used, if there is no primary key, the full row will be used.

briefdescription.para: "page-size" - Memory page size, default value 64 kb.
"file.format" - Specify the message format of data files.
"file-system" - Specify the file system.
"target-file-size" - Target size of a file.

detaileddescription.para: primary key table: the default value is 128 MB. append table: the default value is 256 MB.

briefdescription.para: "blob.target-file-size" - Target size of a blob file. Default is TARGET_FILE_SIZE.
"partition.default-name" - The default partition name in case the dynamic partition column value is null/empty string.
"file.compression" - The default file compression is zstd.

detaileddescription.para: For faster read and write, it is recommended to use zstd.

briefdescription.para: "file.compression.zstd-level" Default file compression zstd level.

detaileddescription.para: For higher compression rates, it can be configured to 9, but the read and write speed will significantly decrease. Default value is 1.

briefdescription.para: "manifest.target-file-size" - Suggested file size of a manifest file.
"manifest.format" - Specify the message format of manifest files.
"manifest.compression" - File compression for manifest, default value is zstd.
"manifest.merge-min-count" - To avoid frequent manifest merges, this parameter specifies the minimum number of ManifestFileMeta to merge, default value is 30.
"manifest.full-compaction-threshold-size" - The size threshold for triggering full compaction of manifest, default value is 16MB.
"source.split.target-size" - Target size of a source split when scanning a bucket.
"source.split.open-file-cost" - Open file cost of a source file.

detaileddescription.para: It is used to avoid reading too many files with a source split, which can be very slow. Default value is 4MB.

briefdescription.para: "scan.snapshot-id" - Optional snapshot id used in case of "from-snapshot" or "from-snapshot-full" scan mode
"scan.mode" - Specify the scanning behavior of the source.

detaileddescription.para: Values can be: "default", "latest-full", "latest", "from-snapshot", "from-snapshot-full". Default value is "default".

briefdescription.para: "read.batch-size" - Read batch size for any file format if it supports.
"write.batch-size" - Write batch size for any file format if it supports.
"write-buffer-size" - Amount of data to build up in memory before converting to a sorted on-disk file.
"snapshot.num-retained.min" - The minimum number of completed snapshots to retain.

detaileddescription.para: Should be greater than or equal to 1. Default value is 10

briefdescription.para: "snapshot.num-retained.max" - The maximum number of completed snapshots to retain.

detaileddescription.para: Should be greater than or equal to the minimum number. Default value is int32 max value.

briefdescription.para: "snapshot.time-retained" - The maximum time of completed snapshots to retain.
"snapshot.expire.limit" - The maximum number of snapshots allowed to expire at a time.
"snapshot.clean-empty-directories" - Whether to try to clean empty directories when expiring snapshots, if enabled, please note: hdfs: may print exceptions in NameNode.

detaileddescription.para: oss/s3: may cause performance issue. Default value is false.

briefdescription.para: "commit.force-compact" - Whether to force a compaction before commit.
"commit.timeout" - Timeout duration of retry when commit failed. No default value.
"commit.max-retries" - Maximum number of retries when commit failed. Default value is 10.

"compaction.max-size-amplification-percent" - The size amplification is defined as the amount (in percentage) of additional storage needed to store a single byte of data in the merge tree for changelog mode table.
"compaction.size-ratio" - Percentage flexibility while comparing sorted run size for changelog mode table.

detaileddescription.para: If the candidate sorted run(s) size is 1% smaller than the next sorted run's size, then include next sorted run into this candidate set. Default value is 1.

briefdescription.para: "num-sorted-run.compaction-trigger" - The sorted run number to trigger compaction.

detaileddescription.para: Includes level0 files (one file one sorted run) and high-level runs (one level one sorted run). Default value is 5.

briefdescription.para: "num-sorted-run.stop-trigger" - The number of sorted runs that trigger the stopping of writes, the default value is 'num-sorted-run.compaction-trigger' + 3.
"num-levels" - Total level number, for example, there are 3 levels, including 0,1,2 levels.
"lookup-wait" - When need to lookup, commit will wait for compaction by lookup.
"lookup-compact" - Lookup compact mode used for lookup compaction.
"compaction.force-up-level-0" - If set to true, compaction strategy will always include all level 0 files in candidates.
"lookup-compact.max-interval" - The max interval for a gentle mode lookup compaction to be triggered.

detaileddescription.para: For every interval, a forced lookup compaction will be performed to flush L0 files to higher level. This option is only valid when lookup-compact mode is gentle. No default value.

briefdescription.para: "sequence.field" - The field that generates the sequence number for primary key table, the sequence number determines which data is the most recent.
"sequence.field.sort-order" - Specify the order of sequence.field.

detaileddescription.para: Values can be: "ascending", "descending". Default value is "ascending".

briefdescription.para: "merge-engine" - Specify the merge engine for table with primary key.

detaileddescription.para: Values can be: "deduplicate", "partial-update", "aggregation", "first-row". Default value is "deduplicate".

briefdescription.para: "sort-engine" - Specify the sort engine for table with primary key.

detaileddescription.para: Values can be: "min-heap", "loser-tree". Default value is "loser-tree".

briefdescription.para: "ignore-delete" - Whether to ignore delete records. Default value is "false".
"fields.default-aggregate-function" - Default aggregate function of all fields for partial-update and aggregate merge function.
"deletion-vectors.enabled" - Whether to enable deletion vectors mode.

detaileddescription.para: In this mode, index files containing deletion vectors are generated when data is written, which marks the data for deletion. During read operations, by applying these index files, merging can be avoided. Default value is false.

briefdescription.para: "deletion-vector.index-file.target-size" - The target size of deletion vector index file.
"deletion-vectors.bitmap64" - Enable 64 bit bitmap implementation.

detaileddescription.para:
Note that only 64 bit bitmap implementation is compatible with Iceberg. Default value is "false".
: bitmap64 dv is not supported.

CHANGELOG_PRODUCER currently only support none
"changelog-producer" - Whether to double write to a changelog file. This changelog file keeps the details of data changes, it can be read directly during stream reads. This can be applied to tables with primary keys. Values can be "none", "input", "lookup", "full-compaction". Default value is "none".

briefdescription.para: "force-lookup" - Whether to force the use of lookup for compaction.
"partial-update.remove-record-on-delete" - Whether to remove the whole row in partial-update engine when records are received.
"partial-update.remove-record-on-sequence-group" - When records of the given sequence groups are received, remove the whole row.
"scan.fallback-branch" - When a batch job queries from a table, if a partition does not exist in the current branch, the reader will try to get this partition from this fallback branch.
"branch" - Specify branch name. Default value is "main".
"file-index.read.enabled" - Whether enabled read file index. Default value is "true".
"data-file.external-paths" - The external paths where the data of this table will be written, multiple elements separated by commas.
"data-file.external-paths.strategy" - The strategy of selecting an external path when writing data.

detaileddescription.para: Values can be: "none", "specific-fs", "round-robin". Default value is "none".

briefdescription.para: "data-file.prefix" - Specify the file name prefix of data files. Default value is "data-".
"index-file-in-data-file-dir" - Whether index file in data file directory.
"row-tracking.enabled" - Whether enable unique row id for append table.
"data-evolution.enabled" - Whether enable data evolution for row tracking table.
"partition.legacy-name" - The legacy partition name is using ToString for all types.

detaileddescription.para: If false, using casting to string for all types. Default value is "true".

briefdescription.para: "blob-as-descriptor" - Read and write blob field using blob descriptor rather than blob bytes.
"global-index.enabled" - Whether to enable global index for scan. Default value is "true".
"global-index.external-path" - Global index root directory, if not set, the global index files will be stored under the index directory.
"aggregation.remove-record-on-delete" - Whether to remove the whole row in aggregation engine when delete records are received.
"scan.tag-name" - Optional tag name used in case of "from-snapshot" scan mode.
"write-only" - If set to "true", compactions and snapshot expiration will be skipped.

detaileddescription.para: This option is used along with dedicated compact jobs. Default value is "false".

briefdescription.para: "compaction.min.file-num" - For file set [f_0,...,f_N], the minimum file number to trigger a compaction for append-only table.
"compaction.force-rewrite-all-files" - Whether to force pick all files for a full compaction.

detaileddescription.para: Usually seen in a compaction task to external paths. Default value is "false".

briefdescription.para: "compaction.optimization-interval" - Implying how often to perform an optimization compaction, this configuration is used to ensure the query timeliness of the read-optimized system table.
"compaction.total-size-threshold" - When total size is smaller than this threshold, force a full compaction.
"compaction.incremental-size-threshold" - When incremental size is bigger than this threshold, force a full compaction.
"compaction.offpeak.start.hour" - The start of off-peak hours, expressed as an integer between 0 and 23, inclusive.

detaileddescription.para: Set to -1 to disable off-peak. Default is -1.

briefdescription.para: "compaction.offpeak.end.hour" - The end of off-peak hours, expressed as an integer between 0 and 23, exclusive.

detaileddescription.para: Set to -1 to disable off-peak. Default is -1.

briefdescription.para: "compaction.offpeak-ratio" - Allows you to set a different (by default, more aggressive) percentage ratio for determining whether larger sorted run's size are included in compactions during off-peak hours.

detaileddescription.para: Works in the same way as compaction.size-ratio. Only applies if offpeak.start.hour and offpeak.end.hour are also enabled. For instance, if your cluster experiences low pressure between 2 AM and 6 PM , you can configure compaction.offpeak.start.hour=2 and compaction.offpeak.end.hour=18 to define this period as off-peak hours. During these hours, you can increase the off-peak compaction ratio (e.g. compaction.offpeak-ratio=20) to enable more aggressive data compaction. Default is 0.

briefdescription.para: "lookup.cache.bloom.filter.enabled" - Whether to enable the bloom filter for lookup cache.
"lookup.cache.bloom.filter.fpp" - Define the default false positive probability for lookup cache bloom filters.
"lookup.remote-file.enabled" - Whether to enable the remote file for lookup.
"lookup.remote-file.level-threshold" - Level threshold of lookup to generate remote lookup files.

detaileddescription.para: Level files below this threshold will not generate remote lookup files. Default value is INT32_MIN.

briefdescription.para: "lookup.cache-spill-compression" - Spill compression for lookup cache, currently zstd, none, lz4 are supported.

detaileddescription.para: Default value is zstd. Noted that java paimon also supports lzo which paimon-cpp does not support for now.

briefdescription.para: "spill-compression.zstd-level" - Default spill compression zstd level.

detaileddescription.para: For higher compression rates, it can be configured to 9, but the read and write speed will significantly decrease. Default value is 1.

briefdescription.para: "cache-page-size" - Memory page size for caching. Default value is 64 kb.

"file.format.per.level" - Define different file format for different level, you can add the conf like this: 'file.format.per.level' = '0:avro,3:parquet', if the file format for level is not provided, the default format which set by FILE_FORMAT will be used.
"file.compression.per.level" - Define different compression policies for different level, you can add the conf like this: 'file.compression.per.level' = '0:lz4,1:zstd'.

detaileddescription.para: If a level is not configured, the default compression set by FILE_COMPRESSION will be used.

briefdescription.para: "lookup.cache-max-memory-size" - Max memory size for lookup cache. Default value is 256 mb.
"lookup.cache.high-priority-pool-ratio" - The fraction of cache memory that is reserved for high-priority data like index, filter.
"bucket-function.type" - The bucket function type for paimon bucket.

detaileddescription.para: Values can be: "default", "mod", "hive". Default value is "default".

briefdescription.para: "lookup.cache-file-retention" - The cached files retention time for lookup.

detaileddescription.para: After the file expires, if there is a need for access, it will be re-read from the DFS to build an index on the local disk. Default value is 1 hour.

briefdescription.para: "lookup.cache-max-disk-size" - Max disk size for lookup cache, you can use this option to limit the use of local disks.
"btree-index.compression" - The compression algorithm to use for BTreeIndex.
"btree-index.compression-level" - The compression level of the compression algorithm.
"btree-index.block-size" - The block size to use for BTreeIndex.
"btree-index.cache-size" - The cache size to use for BTreeIndex.
"btree-index.high-priority-pool-ratio" - The high priority pool ratio to use for BTreeIndex.
"btree-index.records-per-range" - The expected number of records per BTree Index File.
Configuration options and constants for Paimon table operations.

detaileddescription.para: The Options struct contains static string constants that define configuration keys used throughout the Paimon system.
